# Azion Docs — architectures

> All pages of the architectures section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [Solutions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/): Azion solutions reflect how components interact and operate within the platform to attend to different use cases.
- [Secure Your API Gateway with a Perimeter](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/api-gateways/implement-api-gateways-security/): Defining a robust security perimeter through Azion Web Platform ensures you can secure your API Gateways from unauthorized access and threats.
- [Accelerate Applications and APIs with Edge Computing](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/application-acceleration/): Discover how Application Acceleration at Azion enhances API performance and compliance through edge computing, caching, and optimized HTTP methods.
- [Accelerate Application Modernization at the Edge](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/application-modernization/): Explore how Azion Web Platform leverages serverless technology and microservices for modernizing applications, enhancing scalability and performance.
- [Boost Content Delivery Speed at the Edge](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/content-delivery/): Explore how Azion Web Platform enhances content delivery with optimized cache policies, dynamic content handling, and improved user experiences.
- [Enhance Applications with Edge Computing](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/edge-enhanced-applications/): Learn how to enhance your applications and APIs using edge computing.
- [Develop edge-native applications with Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/edge-native-applications/): Learn how to build your API-based applications and front-end entirely on the edge using edge-native computing.
- [Optimize and process images with Azion Web Platform](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/image-processing/): Explore Azion Image Processor to automate resource management, optimize images, and streamline content delivery with advanced cache policies.
- [Build Microservices Apps with Functions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/microservices-applications/): Use Azion for microservices applications. Boost agility, scale, and cost-efficiency.
- [Implement Serverless Architecture with Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/applications/serverless-applications/): Explore serverless computing with Azion Web Platform to build responsive applications using Functions, Cache, and SQL Database for optimal performance.
- [Build a Copilot Assistant with a ReAct AI Agent](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/artificial-intelligence/ai-agent-copilot-assistant/): By integrating edge computing with AI, AI agents like Copilot can deliver fast, personalized support and real-time intelligence directly at the edge.
- [AI Agents Configuration for Third Party LLM Providers](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/artificial-intelligence/ai-agent-third-party-llm/): Learn how to integrate an AI Agent, based on the LangGraph AI Agent Boilerplate, with Third Party LLM, such as OpenAI and Anthropic, to create a personalized AI chatbot.
- [Implement AI Inference in your applications](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/artificial-intelligence/ai-inference-architecture/): Reference architecture for running AI model inference at the edge with low latency and high efficiency, using Azion's Applications, Functions, and SQL Database with Vector Search.
- [AI Inference for Threat Protection in Uploads](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/artificial-intelligence/autonomous-security-ai-agent/): Implement an Azion AI Agent for autonomous security to inspect PDF uploads in real-time, detect PDF Injection attacks, and automatically mitigate risks in web applications.
- [Protect Your Apps with Bot Management](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/bot-management/protect-your-applications-with-bot-management/): Discover Azion Bot Manager, which leverages machine learning for advanced bot detection, ensuring robust security with real-time analytics on the edge platform.
- [Application and Infrastructure Automation](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/by-solution/application-and-infrastructure-automation/): Automate operations to optimize application performance and simplify infrastructure management.
- [Application and Network Security](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/by-solution/application-and-network-security/): Protect applications and networks from threats with edge-native security and observability tools.
- [Application Development](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/by-solution/application-development/): Build scalable, low-latency apps with edge computing and serverless functions.
- [Artificial Intelligence (AI)](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/by-solution/artificial-intelligence/): Deploy AI at the edge for real-time insights, fast responses, and personalized experiences.
- [Service Performance and Reliability](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/by-solution/service-performance-and-reliability/): Enhance application performance, reduce latency, and ensure reliable service delivery at the edge.
- [Streamline App Delivery with Orchestrator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/deploy/application-delivery/): Streamline application delivery and infrastructure management with Azion Orchestrator, enhancing performance with efficient management and automated operations.
- [Automate Infrastructure with Azion Orchestrator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/deploy/infrastructure-orchestration/): Discover how to automate your infrastructure with Azion Orchestrator, focusing on efficient edge node management and streamlined operations for enhanced performance.
- [Reinforce Online Fraud Prevention](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/firewall/online-fraud-prevention/): Use online fraud prevention strategies for digital businesses, including security measures, technologies, and best practices to protect against cyber threats.
- [Enhance Cybersecurity with Azion WAAP](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/firewall/web-application-and-api-protection-waap/): Explore Azion's WAAP for advanced protection from cyber threats including OWASP Top 10 and zero-day attacks using products like WAF and DDoS Protection.
- [Deploy Jamstack Websites at the Edge](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/jamstack/deploy-jamstack-applications/): Explore how Jamstack and Azion enhance e-commerce via secure, scalable solutions using Edge Computing, continuous deployment, and developer-friendly tools.
- [Optimize Video Delivery with Live Streaming](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/live-streaming-delivery/live-streaming-delivery-with-hls/): Explore how edge computing optimizes live streaming with HLS, real-time transcoding, and adaptive bitrate streaming for seamless, scalable, and secure content delivery.
- [Protect Your Business with Security Automation](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/security-automation/security-automation-with-edge-computing/): Security automation allows organizations to streamline repetitive and time-consuming tasks, manage their security posture, and scale their operations.
- [Accelerate security modernization with edge computing](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/architectures/security-modernization/security-modernization-with-edge-computing/): Explore how edge computing enhances security with Firewall, DDoS Protection, and observability products for effective threat detection and system resilience.
